page: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-80 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel processor. It features 80 virtual CPUs across 40 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, supported by a 260 MB L3 cache. The system is equipped with 640 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance, with top-tier throughput in static web serving and image processing. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512, which contribute to strong performance in Passmark CPU tests, software compilation, and database operations. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 287.76 GB/sec for large block reads. Single-core performance and memory latency benchmarks fall within the average tier.

Given its high memory density of 8 GB per vCPU and dedicated compute resources, this instance offers qualitative cost-efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for large-scale database operations, Redis deployments, in-memory data processing, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-80 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server configured with 80 dedicated Intel vCPUs (40 physical cores) and 640 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPUs, this instance relies on its high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core and advanced CPU instruction sets like Intel AMX and AVX-512. Benchmarks show strong multi-core capabilities, with top-tier performance in static web serving and image processing, alongside strong results in database operations and software compilation. Single-core performance remains average. This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including large databases, Redis caching layers, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-80 is an x86_64 server with 80 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 640 GB RAM, and no local storage. It delivers strong multi-core and database performance for memory-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-80 features 80 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 640 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database and web serving workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server featuring eighty dedicated vCPUs and advanced matrix extensions for demanding database and memory-intensive workloads.

Top-tier performance in static web serving and image processing
